title: ayenia spinulosa
intro: Ayenia spinulosa, also known as the "thorny ayenia" or "thorny spiny ayenia," is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Ayenia spinulosa include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and combat infections. The herbal preparations of Ayenia spinulosa typically include extracts from its leaves and stems, which can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams for various medicinal purposes.
